tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                             Just the way you are- Bruno Mars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: jesusXchrist
Email: itz_alex3@yahoo.com

Tuning: Standard

Me playing the song without capo
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UaialAqOCMA
Yes, it sounds perfect if not close to the real thing (: that’s what I do~ Peace
This version of the tab is thanks to one of my commenters mclovin3287 
Another way to play Just The way you are


Capo 1
All chords relative to capo

[tab]        [ch]E[/ch] 
e|------0-------------|
B|------0-------------|
G|------1-Index-------|
D|------2-Ring--------|
A|------2-Middle------|
E|------0-------------|[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
e|------0-------------|
B|------0-------------|
G|------6-Pinky-------|
D|------6-Ring--------|
A|------4-Index-------|
E|------x-------------|[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
e|------0-------------|
B|------2-Pinky-------|
G|------2-Ring--------|
D|------0-------------|
A|------0-------------|
E|------0-------------|[/tab]

Strum Pattern: \\\ \/ / \\ \/ and then repeat immediately (I hope I wrote the pattern 
cause it’s really hard to write down… I just strum/keep a beat naturally…


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Oh her eyes, her eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Make the stars look like they're not shining[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Her hair, her hair[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Falls perfectly without her trying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd4[/ch]
She's so beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd4[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
And I tell her every day[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Yeah I know, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
When I compliment her[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
She wont believe me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
And its so, its so[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Sad to think she don't see what I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd4[/ch]
But every time she asks me do I look okay[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
I say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
When I see your face[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#m7[/ch]
There's not a thing that I would change[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
Cause you're amazing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
And when you smile,[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
The whole world stops and stares for awhile[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
Cause girl you're amazing[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Her lips, her lips[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I could kiss them all day if she'd let me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Her laugh, her laugh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
She hates but I think its so sexy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd4[/ch]
She's so beautiful[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]
And I tell her every day[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Oh you know, you know, you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Id never ask you to change[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]
If perfect is what you're searching for[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Then just stay the same[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
So don't even bother asking[/tab]

If you look okay
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
You know I say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
When I see your face[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#m7[/ch]
There's not a thing that I would change[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
Cause you're amazing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
And when you smile,[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
The whole world stops and stares for awhile[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
Cause girl you're amazing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
The way you are[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]
The way you are[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
Girl you're amazing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Just the way you are[/tab]

Last Chorus Actually Silent do whatever you want here, impress your lady by singing well (:

When I see your face
There's not a thing that I would change
Cause you're amazing
Just the way you are
And when you smile,
The whole world stops and stares for awhile
Cause girl you're amazing
Just the way you are
